utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan:
- health_coverage: Provided, includes physical and mental health insurance with costs, plus preventive care and a total monthly health cost. Fully specified per requirement.
- property_coverage: Provided, includes home/contents insurance with costs. It specifies home coverage with cost and additional tech/smart home items and total property cost. Fully specified per requirement.
- travel_coverage: Provided, includes travel insurance with costs and total travel cost. Fully specified per requirement.
- additional_services: Provided, includes enhancement services with costs and total additional cost. Fully specified per requirement.
- total_budget: Provided, includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown, plus savings info. Fully specified per requirement.
All 5 required items are present and include costs/details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: (1) Health physical: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 8. (2) Mental health: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 8. (3) Preventive care: 'Enhanced screenings and executive health assessments' matches health_enhancement_services.Preventive Care Package with rating 8. (4) Home coverage: LifeFirst Standard Coverage appears under property_protection.home_content with rating 8. (5) Technology protection: matches property_enhancement_services.Technology Protection with rating 10. (6) Smart home integration: matches property_enhancement_services.Smart Home Integration with rating 8. (7) Travel: InsurePlus Standard Plan appears under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 7. (8) Premium membership: matches general_services.Premium Insurance Membership with rating 10.
